positive: A stylized, minimalist representation of a forest biome, viewed from an overhead, top-down perspective. The central subject is a winding path or river formed by negative space, contrasting sharply with the densely textured green foliage and earthy brown undergrowth. The style should be highly graphic and woodcut-inspired, using only two or three flat, contrasting color areas (deep teal, forest green, sepia brown). Strong, crisp silhouettes and clean lines define the boundaries of the leaves, trees, and ground elements. The composition must be perfectly symmetrical and centered, optimized for high-contrast apparel printing. Flat graphic style, natural light source for clarity, high resolution, vector art aesthetic, suitable for repeat patterns or central placement.
negative: blur, lowres, grainy, noisy, watermarks, signature, text, writing, logos, dirty, artifact, poorly rendered, bad anatomy, deformed, extra limbs, complex background, photographic, realistic, gradient
